task_completion.description: A dashboard named 'Sprint 1 Review' is created in the TailwindTraders project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Azure DevOps interface shows a dashboard titled 'Sprint 1 Review' under the TailwindTraders project.

task_completion.description: A Markdown widget named 'Sprint Goals' is added to the dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Markdown widget with the title 'Sprint Goals' is visible on the dashboard.

task_completion.description: The Markdown widget contains the required sprint goals text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Markdown widget displays the exact text: 'Complete product inventory search feature', 'Fix all Priority 1 bugs', and 'Achieve 80% code coverage on new modules'.

task_completion.description: A Query Tile widget showing the count of 'Active Bugs' is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Query Tile widget is visible on the dashboard, displaying a numerical count and referencing 'Active Bugs'.

task_completion.description: A Chart for Work Items widget showing 'Sprint 1 All Items' grouped by 'State' is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Chart widget (e.g., pie chart, bar chart) is visible on the dashboard, titled or referencing 'Sprint 1 All Items' and showing data grouped by work item 'State'.

task_completion.description: At least one additional configured widget is present on the dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A fourth widget of any type (e.g., Burndown, Assigned to Me, etc.) is visible on the dashboard alongside the Markdown, Query Tile, and Chart widgets.

integrity.description: The agent used the Azure DevOps web interface to create the dashboard and widgets.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating and interacting with the Azure DevOps web UI, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The dashboard is genuinely rendered in the Azure DevOps UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dashboard and widgets appear as standard Azure DevOps UI elements, not as text in an editor or a locally mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the dashboard or widget contents.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's Inspect Element / Developer Tools being used to alter the DOM to fake the presence of widgets or text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project name is 'TailwindTraders'. Dashboard name must be 'Sprint 1 Review'. The dashboard must have at least 4 widgets in total. The Markdown widget must contain the goals: 'Complete product inventory search feature', 'Fix all Priority 1 bugs', and 'Achieve 80% code coverage on new modules'.
